summary: One material count_tokens/messages inconsistency remains in the inspected vault-key boundary.

findings.invariant: 2. A gateway-KEY principal always keys gwkey:<keyId> (a client session_id is subscoped UNDER the key). A direct client with an untrusted session_id keys csid:<orgId>:usr:<billeeUserId>:<sessionId>. Everything else is ephemeral eph:<correlationId>. The finally clears ONLY the ephemeral case.
findings.title: count_tokens cannot key gateway-key principals by gwkey:<keyId>
findings.recommendation: Thread the verified gateway key id into proxyGatewayCountTokens, matching proxyGatewayMessages' GatewayForwardOpts/keyId path, and pass keyId to deriveVaultSession so key principals use gwkey:<keyId> or gwkey:<keyId>:<client session_id> instead of csid/eph.
